title: taraxacum nigrofructum
intro: Taraxacum nigrofructum, also known as the black-fruited dandelion or black-seeded dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to various health benefits. The plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, to treat digestive issues, reduce stress, and support liver health. Additionally, Taraxacum nigrofructum is believed to possess antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a potential remedy for skin conditions and infections.
